hooks.command: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" || exit 1 && git add -A && git diff --staged --quiet || (BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD) && FILES=$(git diff --staged --name-only | head -5 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ $//') && git commit -m "chore(auto): $FILES" && git push origin "$BRANCH")
